pi_items.source: O*NET OnLine search confirms 15-1299.02 encompasses Geospatial Information Scientists and Technologists.
The task instructions situate the agent at a metropolitan planning organization which directly corresponds to Urban Planning.
O*NET SOC system places 15-0000 codes strictly under Computer and Mathematical Occupations.

Analysis of the task environment, which involves debugging a Python ETL pipeline for geospatial data with specific bugs in coordinate transformations, area projections, topological numerical tolerance, and GeoJSON standards.
verifier.py checks for a passing score >= 60.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires fixing five specific bugs in a Python geospatial ETL pipeline: 1) Swapped latitude/longitude coordinates in coordinate_transform.py. 2) Buffer distance incorrectly applied in degrees instead of meters in spatial_operations.py. 3) Area calculated on raw geographic degrees instead of a projected CRS in area_calculator.py. 4) Exact floating-point comparisons (== 0) for cross products in topology_validator.py. 5) Missing FeatureCollection wrapper around the exported array in geojson_exporter.py. The GeoJSON parcel data used for testing is synthetically generated using real-world coordinates around Austin, TX.
